name: allocafi
description: AllocaFi non-custodial Virtual Budget Accounts app.

scripts.test: node tests/budget-template-library.test.mjs && node tests/admin-core-routing.test.mjs && node tests/allocafi-connect.test.mjs && node tests/security.test.mjs && node tests/enterprise-dashboard.test.mjs && node tests/family-treasury.test.mjs && node tests/allocafi-pay.test.mjs && node tests/ledgercore.test.mjs
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
